sentences.arabic: تَنَاوَلَ الزُّمَلَاءُ غَدَاءَهُمْ مَعًا فِي غُرْفَةِ الِاسْتِرَاحَةِ.
sentences.translation: Kolege su ručale zajedno u prostoriji za odmor.
sentences.translationEn: The colleagues had lunch together in the break room.

sentences.arabic: تَحَدَّثُوا عَنْ أَخْبَارِ الْيَوْمِ وَضَحِكُوا كَثِيرًا.
sentences.translation: Razgovarali su o dnevnim vijestima i puno se smijali.
sentences.translationEn: They talked about the day's news and laughed a lot.

sentences.arabic: جَلَبَ سَامِيٌّ طَعَامًا مَطْبُوخًا مِنَ الْبَيْتِ وَشَارَكَهُمْ.
sentences.translation: Sami je donio kuhanu hranu od kuće i podijelio s njima.
sentences.translationEn: Sami brought home-cooked food and shared it with them.

sentences.arabic: قَالُوا إِنَّ وَقْتَ الْغَدَاءِ هُوَ أَجْمَلُ وَقْتٍ فِي الْيَوْمِ.
sentences.translation: Rekli su da je ručak najljepše vrijeme u danu.
sentences.translationEn: They said that lunchtime is the nicest time of the day.
